metadata.description: Indian wholesale commodity prices for food adulteration detection
metadata.source: APMC Market Data, NCDEX, Indian Commodity Exchange averages

commodities.name: Honey (Pure)
commodities.notes: Pure raw honey. If retail is below ₹350/kg, likely adulterated with sugar syrup.

commodities.name: Ghee (Cow)
commodities.notes: Pure cow ghee. Below ₹550/kg suggests palm oil or vanaspati adulteration.

commodities.name: Ghee (Buffalo)
commodities.notes: Pure buffalo ghee.

commodities.name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
commodities.notes: Imported EVOO. Below ₹800/kg likely pomace or mixed oil.

commodities.name: Saffron (Kesar)
commodities.notes: Per KG wholesale. Sold in grams typically (₹150/g). Heavy adulteration with corn silk.

commodities.name: Coconut Oil (Cold Pressed)
commodities.notes: Cold-pressed grade.

commodities.name: Mustard Oil
commodities.notes: Pure kachchi ghani mustard oil.

commodities.name: Turmeric Powder
commodities.notes: Curcumin 3%+ grade. Adulterated with metanil yellow or lead chromate.

commodities.name: Red Chilli Powder
commodities.notes: Teja/Byadgi grade. Adulterated with brick powder, sudan dye.

commodities.name: Black Pepper
commodities.notes: Malabar grade. Papaya seeds commonly used as adulterant.

commodities.name: Cumin Seeds
commodities.notes: Gujarat grade. Grass seeds used as adulterant.

commodities.name: Basmati Rice
commodities.notes: 1121 grade. Mixed with non-basmati or plastic rice allegations.

commodities.name: A2 Milk
commodities.notes: Per litre. Premium A2 desi cow milk.

commodities.name: Almond
commodities.notes: California/Afghani grade.

commodities.name: Cashew
commodities.notes: W240/W320 grade.

commodities.name: Jaggery (Gud)
commodities.notes: Organic grade. Chemical jaggery uses chemicals for color.

commodities.name: Paneer
commodities.notes: Made from full cream milk. Starch and skimmed milk powder adulteration common.

commodities.name: Tea (CTC)
commodities.notes: Assam CTC grade. Iron filings and used tea leaves as adulterants.

commodities.name: Coffee (Filter)
commodities.notes: Arabica/Robusta blend. Chicory beyond declared ratio is adulteration.

commodities.name: Cinnamon (Dalchini)
commodities.notes: True Ceylon cinnamon. Cassia bark often sold as cinnamon (higher coumarin).
